channel.title: Gaming on AITechReviews
channel.description: Recent content in Gaming on AITechReviews

item.title: Best Armor Sets in AC Odyssey (Complete Guide)
item.description:
Best Armor Sets in AC Odyssey

Choosing the right armor set is important for maximizing your build in Assassin’s Creed Odyssey.

Best Assassin Armor

Pirate Set

Best for stealth builds.

Bonuses:

  • Assassin damage
  • Adrenaline generation

Best Warrior Armor

Spartan War Hero Set

Perfect for melee combat.

Bonuses:

  • Warrior damage
  • Weapon damage

Best Hunter Armor

Artemis Set

Ideal for bow-focused builds.

Bonuses:

  • Hunter damage
  • Headshot damage

How to Get Legendary Armor

Legendary armor comes from:

item.title: Easiest Way to Upgrade Your Ship in AC Odyssey
item.description:
Easiest Way to Upgrade Your Ship in AC Odyssey

Ship upgrades require large amounts of resources in Assassin’s Creed Odyssey.

This guide explains how to farm them quickly.

Required Resources

Ship upgrades need:

  • Olive wood
  • Iron metal
  • Obsidian glass
  • Ancient tablets
  • Drachmae

Best Resource Farming Methods

Sink Pirate Ships

Pirate ships give large rewards.

Look for ships around:

  • Kephallonia
  • Korinthia
  • Aegean Sea

Board Instead of Destroy

Boarding ships gives:

  • More loot
  • Extra resources
  • Additional drachmae

Loot Nation Chests

Nation chests give:

item.title: Fastest Way to Earn Money in AC Odyssey (2026 Guide)
item.description:
Fastest Way to Earn Money in AC Odyssey

If you are struggling to upgrade your gear or ship in Assassin’s Creed Odyssey, this guide explains the fastest ways to earn drachmae.

Drachmae are required for:

  • Ship upgrades
  • Weapon upgrades
  • Armor improvements
  • Blacksmith services

Using the methods below, you can earn large amounts of money quickly.

Quick Overview

Best money methods in AC Odyssey:

  • Athens wall runs
  • Mercenary farming
  • Fort raids
  • Selling epic gear

Athens Wall Run (Best Early Game Method)

Athens has one of the longest continuous walls in the game.
